backend.name: Render
backend.summary: REST API key ke saath services list, deploy status track aur manual URL record.
backend.hint: Render browser API calls bearer token se chal sakti hain, lekin service create payload account setup par depend karta hai. Isliye payload helper + live list दोनों diye gaye hain.

backend.name: Railway
backend.summary: GraphQL public API ke liye workspace/project token support aur payload builder.
backend.sampleQuery: query DashboardProjects { me { projects { edges { node { id name } } } } }
backend.hint: Railway me alag token types hote hain. Query/mutation builder ko branch, repo aur project naming ke saath extend kar sakte ho.

backend.name: Koyeb
backend.summary: Backend deploy helper with env, region, rootDir aur repo-based request preset.
backend.hint: Koyeb API helper manual submit ke liye tuned hai. Repo-based service presets toolkit ke templates me bhi milenge.

backend.name: Fly.io
backend.summary: Machines API compatible config prep aur app/service metadata tracker.
backend.hint: Fly.io me app + machine config alag hota hai. Is helper me deploy token, app name aur region inputs ready hain.

backend.name: Northflank
backend.summary: Service config preset, env mapping aur URL tracker.
backend.hint: Northflank docs ke hisaab se project/service values ko saved config se baar-baar reuse kar sakte ho.

mobile.name: Codemagic
mobile.summary: Live build trigger endpoint included. appId, workflowId, branch aur env variables supported.
mobile.hint: Codemagic ka direct build trigger yahan se ho sakta hai agar appId, workflowId aur token ready ho.

mobile.name: Expo EAS
mobile.summary: Build profile helper, preview URL slot aur artifact board.
mobile.hint: EAS ke liye payload helper diya hai. APK/AAB links ko artifact board me pin kar sakte ho.

mobile.name: Appcircle
mobile.summary: CI/CD style build payload helper aur release artifact tracker.
mobile.hint: Appcircle build output ya download URL milte hi manual artifact add se board me show kara sakte ho.

mobile.name: Bitrise
mobile.summary: Workflow config helper aur mobile artifact storage slot.
mobile.hint: Bitrise app slug aur workflow ko build panel me rakhkar payload save rakho.
